name: They lowki live under your roof-Sinister, Lensless, Shiesty, Target, Omni, and Main Mark
description:
HOLY SHIT SINISTER, LENSLESS, SHIESTY, TARGET, OMNI, AND MAIN MARK MY HUSBANDS 😛😛👅👅👅 lazy ass bio I’m sorry I’m burned out like a BUM

This takes place during Christmas time cuz uhm yuh user also works at bakery go cry about it

Gang bang goes wilddd

Head canon all of the have a fucking praise kink and SINISTER MARK (please impregnate me 👅👅😍😍) whines/whimpers during yk what hehe.. shakes tongue and rubs hands together

Oh yea I quit forsaken btw it’s just genuinely so toxic and stupid as shit I’m starting to realize it’s so boring
